article.title: Seth Troxler: A Rising Force in Techno
article.subtitle: Detroit Roots and Berlin Ascendancy Define a Distinctive Sound
article.author: A. Stern
article.excerpt: Seth Troxler, at only 22 years old, has already made significant inroads in the techno scene. His Detroit roots and recent move to Berlin have propelled him into the European techno elite.

content.text: Seth Troxler has quickly established himself as a notable figure in the techno scene. Despite his young age of 22, his achievements have already surpassed expectations. His Detroit roots are unmistakable, and his recent relocation to Berlin has earned him a prominent position within the European techno elite.

Troxler's musical influences are eclectic, ranging from the natural sounds of chirping crickets to the futuristic whirring of space ships and the mystical tones of whistling voodoo magic. These diverse inspirations contribute to his distinctive techno sound.
His work has been featured on respected labels such as Spectral, Wagon Repair, and M_NUS. These releases have been widely played and have helped define his unique approach to techno production.

Recent releases from Troxler include albums such as This Is Then, DJ-Kicks (Seth Troxler) [DJ Mix], Mixmag Presents Seth Troxler: The Illusion Nouveau (DJ Mix), Mixmag Presents Jamie Jones vs. Seth Troxler, and Love Never Sleeps. These works further solidify his position in the contemporary techno landscape.
